info.name: Retail Optical Clinic Management System
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Optical Clinic Management System.

Authentication: JWT Bearer token obtained via POST /auth/login.

Roles: ADMIN (full access), CASHIER (limited), OPTOMETRIST (professional).

Base URL: http://localhost:5000/api/v1

request.description: Returns server status, environment, and uptime. No authentication required.

response.name: 200 - Server Running
response.body:
{
  "status": "OK",
  "message": "Retail Optical Clinic Management API is running",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-28T10:00:00.000Z",
  "environment": "development",
  "uptime": 12345.67
}

request.description:
Authenticate user and receive JWT token. Token is automatically saved to the `authToken` collection variable.

**Seeded Users:**
- Admin: admin@clinic.local / Admin@12345
- Optometrist: optometrist@clinic.local / Opto@12345

**Security:** Account locks after 5 failed attempts in 15 minutes.

response.name: 200 - Login Successful
401 - Invalid Credentials
423 - Account Locked

request.description: Retrieve authenticated user's profile. Requires Bearer token.

response.name: 200 - Profile Fetched

request.description: Logout current user. JWT is discarded client-side.

response.name: 200 - Logout Successful

request.description:
List patients with pagination, search, and filtering. Soft-deleted patients excluded by default.

**Access:** Any authenticated user.

response.name: 200 - Patients Listed
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Patients fetched successfully",
  "data": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "patientCode": "PAT-1711593600000-5847",
        "fullName": "John Doe",
        "dateOfBirth": "1990-05-15",
        "gender": "MALE",
        "branchId": 1,
        "branch": { "id": 1, "name": "Downtown Clinic", "code": "DT-001" },
        "registrationDate": "2026-03-28",
        "phoneNumbers": [],
        "address": null,
        "emergencyContact": null,
        "insuranceInfo": null,
        "additionalInfo": null,
        "deletedAt": null,
        "createdAt": "2026-03-28T00:00:00.000Z",
        "updatedAt": "2026-03-28T00:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "page": 1,
      "limit": 20,
      "total": 1,
      "totalPages": 1
    }
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-03-28T10:00:00.000Z"
}

request.description:
Register a new patient with comprehensive profile information.

Detects duplicate patients (same name, DOB, primary phone, branch). Set `duplicateOverride: true` to bypass.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

**Phone format:** Exactly 10 digits (no dashes/spaces).

response.name: 201 - Patient Created
409 - Duplicate Patient Detected

request.description:
Retrieve single patient details by ID.

**Access:** Any authenticated user.

response.name: 200 - Patient Details
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Patient fetched successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "patientCode": "PAT-1711593600000-5847",
    "fullName": "John Doe",
    "dateOfBirth": "1990-05-15",
    "gender": "MALE",
    "branchId": 1,
    "branch": { "id": 1, "name": "Downtown Clinic", "code": "DT-001" },
    "registrationDate": "2026-03-28",
    "phoneNumbers": [],
    "address": null,
    "emergencyContact": null,
    "insuranceInfo": null,
    "additionalInfo": null,
    "deletedAt": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-28T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-28T00:00:00.000Z"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-03-28T10:00:00.000Z"
}

response.name: 404 - Patient Not Found

request.description:
Update active patient. All fields optional. Pass `null` to remove nested objects (address, emergencyContact, etc.).

**Access:** ADMIN, CASHIER, OPTOMETRIST.

response.name: 200 - Patient Updated

request.description:
Soft delete a patient (marks as deleted, preserves data). Records who deleted and reason.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

**Reason:** Optional, 3-500 characters.

response.name: 200 - Patient Deleted

request.description:
Restore a soft-deleted patient. Validates no active duplicate exists with same name/DOB/phone/branch.

**Access:** ADMIN, CASHIER.

response.name: 200 - Patient Restored
409 - Active Duplicate Exists

request.description:
List branches with pagination and search.

**Access:** ADMIN, CASHIER.

response.name: 200 - Branches Listed

request.description:
Create a new clinic branch.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

**Code format:** 2-30 chars (A-Z, 0-9, `-`, `_`). Auto-uppercased.

response.name: 201 - Branch Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Branch created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Downtown Clinic",
    "code": "DT-001",
    "address": "123 Main St, Toronto, ON M5V 3A8",
    "_count": { "patients": 0 },
    "createdAt": "2026-03-28T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-28T00:00:00.000Z"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-03-28T10:00:00.000Z"
}

response.name: 409 - Duplicate Code

request.description:
Retrieve branch details with patient statistics.

**Access:** ADMIN, CASHIER.

response.name: 200 - Branch Details

request.description:
Update branch information. At least one field required.

**Access:** ADMIN, CASHIER.

response.name: 200 - Branch Updated

request.description:
Delete branch. Only allowed if no patients are linked.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

response.name: 200 - Branch Deleted
409 - Has Linked Patients

request.description:
List all roles with pagination and search.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

response.name: 200 - Roles Listed

request.description:
Create a new role. System roles (ADMIN, CASHIER) cannot be created via this endpoint.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

**Name format:** 2-50 chars, starts with letter, A-Z/0-9/underscore. Auto-uppercased.

response.name: 201 - Role Created
409 - Role Already Exists

request.description:
Retrieve specific role.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

response.name: 200 - Role Details

request.description:
Update role name. System roles (ADMIN, CASHIER) cannot be renamed.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

response.name: 200 - Role Updated
400 - System Role Cannot Be Renamed

request.description:
Delete role. System roles (ADMIN, CASHIER) cannot be deleted. Role must have no assigned users.

**Access:** ADMIN only.

response.name: 200 - Role Deleted
400 - System Role Cannot Be Deleted
409 - Has Assigned Users
